tool_args.diagnosis: The root cause of the P1 alert on the payments service is the recent upgrade to the payment gateway SDK (v4.0.0), which introduced a breaking change in the response schema. The new SDK expects the 'transaction_id' field to be nested under 'data.transaction_id', but the service is still processing responses in the old format (flat 'transaction_id'). This mismatch causes transaction failures and retries, leading to a 12.4% error rate on the /api/v2/charge endpoint. The spike in errors and latency aligns with the deployment time.
tool_args.action: Roll back the payment gateway SDK to version v3.8.1 (deploy-b82c1a) to restore the previous response schema compatibility. Monitor the service after the rollback to confirm resolution. If rolling back is not feasible, apply a quick fix to the service code to handle both response formats until a permanent solution is implemented.
